info.name: THUNDEROBOT-controlador de juego inalámbrico G50S, mando con efecto Hall, gatillos, frecuencia de sondeo de 1000Hz, para Switch, PC, Android e IOS

specifications.name: Compatible Modelo de Nintendo
specifications.value: Nintendo interruptor,Nintendo Switch OJO,Nintendo Switch Lite

faqs.question: ¿Este Control funciona para el teléfono Bluetooth?
¿Tiene una memoria USB para la computadora que no tiene Bluetooth?
sus botones tienen switches mecánicos o de membrana?

reviews.content: I used it for 2 hours with the USB connector and it works very well. It's lighter than an Xbox controller, but still feels like a very good quality product for the price. It feels strange to use another controller after using an Xbox one for a long time, but you get used to it after a while. Highly recommended if you buy it for 32 dollars.

This controller feels very good, the lighting quality is quite good, just like the vibration. I have used it on my phone with Bluetooth and my switch, and it has quite a few perfect buttons to set them all up.

It arrived quite quickly to Mexico, the control materials feel high quality, I used it for about 2 hours and everything was perfect, it connected easily to the PC, I didn't have to configure anything.

Is this the perfect purchase? First of all, its design is honestly very beautiful, comfortable and feels of good quality (the button doesn't click if you press hard, its buttons and functions work perfectly), but of course perfection isn't about everything working correctly, there's always something that doesn't work as well as others. I don't know why, but as you can see in image 3, AVG Error is from 0. 7% in hands jostins but this only happens when connected via USB 2 chip. 4G already connected via cable or Bluetooth is at 0%, which in the end is a bit strange but they are minor issues. 
 
 In conclusion, it is a very good controller for its price, would I buy it again? I would definitely buy it again, and it will be for the white color. Well, that will be for next time..... 😃 🎮

Simply amazing, its grip is very good, it has several additional buttons to use along with an assistant for R3 and L3 that stays at the top, preventing wear on the analog sticks. Very nice and has settings for button light intensity and vibration strength. 
 
 I initially tested it on the cellphone and it connected easily via Bluetooth. I tried several games that I never imagined the controller would work for. Already on the computer, it worked well through the Bluetooth adapter and then I tested with the USB-C cable, the result was quite satisfactory. Excellent for the cost-benefit ratio, arrived in three days and I have nothing to complain about.
Incredible macros and paddles, option to reset Dead Zone (back+star for 5s). Vibration and lighting control. Soft and responsive buttons. Good grip and comfortable! Highly recommended!

very good quality control, its triggers feel great and respond immediately to actions, the vibration is intense and immersive, and the adoption to any device is amazing. I haven't had it for long, but it has been very comfortable to use.

It's perfect! The macros are great for fighting games, and it's very difficult to find a controller with more than 4 macro buttons. This one comes with 6 that are very easy to reach! The joysticks are super soft, and the up/down/left/right buttons have a clicky feel like a mouse, making it perfect for games that require precise movement. I loved it!
It's a good controller, I was quite surprised by it, comfortable and good response with the USB to connect to the PC, I highly recommend it.
